title: Tandoori Chicken Wings
description: A popular Indian-inspired dish featuring marinated chicken wings grilled to perfection. Spicy, savory, and utterly delicious.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, ginger, garlic, lemon juice, garam masala, and cayenne pepper (if using).
Add the chicken wings to the marinade and mix until coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill the chicken wings for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through and slightly charred.
Brush the tandoori masala onto the chicken wings during the last 5 minutes of grilling.
Serve hot, garnished with cilantro if desired.
